title: InstCombine: Infer nnan and ninf on fpext
author: arsenm
description:
Teach SimplifyDemandedFPClass to do this, although this is
not yet applied directly to the cast.

tests.test_body:
declare nofpclass(pinf pzero psub pnorm) half @returns_negative_or_nan_f16()

define nofpclass(nan ninf nzero nsub nnorm) float @ret_no_negative_no_nan__fpext__select_negative_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %negative.or.nan = call half @returns_negative_or_nan_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %negative.or.nan, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

declare nofpclass(nan zero sub norm) half @returns_inf_f16()

define nofpclass(inf) float @ret_no_inf__fpext__select_inf_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %inf = call half @returns_inf_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %inf, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

declare nofpclass(ninf nzero nsub nnorm) half @returns_positive_or_nan_f16()

define nofpclass(nan pinf pzero psub pnorm) float @ret_no_positive_no_nan__fpext__select_positive_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %positive.or.nan = call half @returns_positive_or_nan_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %positive.or.nan, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

declare nofpclass(inf zero sub norm) half @returns_nan_f16()

define nofpclass(nan) float @ret_no_nan__fpext__select_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %nan = call half @returns_nan_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %nan, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}

declare nofpclass(zero sub norm) half @returns_inf_or_nan_f16()

define nofpclass(nan inf) float @ret_no_inf_no_nan__fpext__select_inf_or_nan_or_unknown(i1 %cond, half %unknown) {
  %inf.or.nan = call half @returns_inf_or_nan_f16()
  %select = select i1 %cond, half %inf.or.nan, half %unknown
  %result = fpext half %select to float
  ret float %result
}
